case_title: SPOLTER, JERRY et al vs. DAVIS, CHARLES J et al

docket_entries.description: PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPOLTER, JERRY SPOLTER, MCDONALD & MANNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, CHARLES J DAVIS, KATHLEEN $19,710.36 PRINCIPAL, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,784.36, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD JUDGMENT CLERK NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF OCT-26-1992, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPOLTER, JERRY SPOLTER, MCDONALD & MANNION AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CHARLES J DAVIS, KATHLEEN
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPOLTER, JERRY HEARING SET FOR OCT-26-1992 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SPOLTER, JERRY SPOLTER, MCDONALD & MANNION
